title.en: China-to-Gabon Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入加蓬：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入加彭：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Gabon AGANOR standards and conformity context, ARSEE electricity-sector licensing, SEEG grid-connection review, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface requirements, IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC evidence, 50 Hz 220/380 V grid settings, and equatorial high-humidity project conditions — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与加蓬AGANOR标准及合格评定背景、ARSEE电力行业许可、SEEG并网审查、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727公用电网接口要求、IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC证据、50 Hz 220/380 V电网参数以及赤道高湿项目条件——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與加彭AGANOR標準及合格評定背景、ARSEE電力行業許可、SEEG併網審查、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727公用電網介面要求、IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC證據、50 Hz 220/380 V電網參數以及赤道高濕項目條件——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, AGANOR conformity scope determination, ARSEE licence decision, SEEG grid-connection approval, customs determination, lender approval, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, project developers, designers, and installers should verify current Gabon standards, import and conformity rules, electricity-sector licensing, SEEG technical connection conditions, donor or lender specifications, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、AGANOR合格评定范围裁定、ARSEE许可决定、SEEG并网批准、海关裁定、融资方批准或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、项目开发商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行加蓬标准、进口及合格评定规则、电力行业许可、SEEG技术接入条件、捐助方或融资方规格及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、AGANOR合格評定範圍裁定、ARSEE許可決定、SEEG併網批准、海關裁定、融資方批准或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、項目開發商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行加彭標準、進口及合格評定規則、電力行業許可、SEEG技術接入條件、捐助方或融資方規格及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Gabon, the key practical gaps are: (1) confirming whether AGANOR conformity assessment or Gabon-adopted IEC standards are required for the product or project; (2) obtaining ARSEE licensing or authorisation for electricity generation where the PV project is grid-connected or commercial; (3) securing SEEG technical connection approval for utility-interconnected systems on the 50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V network; (4) providing IEC 62109-1/-2 safety, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface, and IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC evidence; and (5) validating firmware, enclosure protection, corrosion resistance, ventilation, and derating for Gabon's equatorial high-humidity climate. China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 evidence is useful background but is not automatically accepted as Gabon conformity, ARSEE licensing, SEEG connection, or lender documentation.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口加蓬时，主要实际差距包括：（1）确认产品或项目是否需要AGANOR合格评定或加蓬采纳的IEC标准；（2）并网或商业光伏项目是否需要ARSEE发电许可或授权；（3）在50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V网络上并网时取得SEEG技术接入批准；（4）提供IEC 62109-1/-2安全、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727公用电网接口及IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC证据；（5）针对加蓬赤道高湿气候验证固件、外壳防护、耐腐蚀、通风和降额。中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964证据可作为背景材料，但不会自动等同于加蓬合格评定、ARSEE许可、SEEG接入或融资方文件。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口加彭時，主要實際差距包括：（1）確認產品或項目是否需要AGANOR合格評定或加彭採納的IEC標準；（2）併網或商業光伏項目是否需要ARSEE發電許可或授權；（3）在50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V網路上併網時取得SEEG技術接入批准；（4）提供IEC 62109-1/-2安全、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727公用電網介面及IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC證據；（5）針對加彭赤道高濕氣候驗證韌體、外殼防護、耐腐蝕、通風和降額。中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964證據可作為背景材料，但不會自動等同於加彭合格評定、ARSEE許可、SEEG接入或融資方文件。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
